value: /Users/davidcruwys/dev/ad/apps/dark-factory/experiments/ylo/blackboard/runs/b65/transcript.txt

A tutorial demonstrating how to use Claude Code and context engineering to automate a lead generation and outreach workflow for a public speaking coach (Guy Monroe), specifically building a system to research, evaluate, and generate presence reports for 150 plastic surgeon prospects using web searches, structured data, and iterative prompt refinement.
context engineering
Claude Code
public speaking coach
lead generation automation
plastic surgeons outreach
AI marketing workflow
prompt engineering
presence report
scorecard assessment
charisma coach
web search automation
HTML report generation
CSV data processing
expert coaching
sales outreach
Content targets expert coaches and consultants seeking outreach automation tools
Primary audience includes charisma coaches and public speaking coaches (exemplified by Guy Munro)
Secondary audience targets plastic surgeons as prospective clients or leads
Audience members are assumed to have done manual prompt engineering work (e.g., in ChatGPT) before seeking automation
Audience skill level ranges from semi-technical (comfortable with spreadsheets, ChatGPT prompting) to non-technical (need guidance on Claude Code permissions)
Content addresses business development professionals wanting to generate 150+ warm leads
Audience members may have domain-specific scoring frameworks or evaluation rubrics they want to automate
Viewers are expected to be unfamiliar with context engineering but open to learning it
Audience includes solo practitioners or small consultancy operators, not enterprise teams
Content appeals to people who do one-to-one coaching and want to scale outreach without hiring staff
urgency and opportunity
aspiration and ambition
expert authority and credibility
curiosity and discovery
problem-solution tension
peer validation and social proof
empowerment and self-efficacy
excitement and momentum
collaboration and partnership
fear of missing out or inefficiency

150 target plastic surgeons in a spreadsheet; 4 test surgeons found (2 from Sydney AU: Jeremy Hunt and Ellis Choi; 2 from London: Jan Steneck and Sijatha Tadapathy); 3 workflow steps (research, scorecard, assessment report); 36% context window remaining noted during session; 2 files initially created (fact sheet and presence report) later combined into 1; planned 150 hot leads in a couple of days
Are you an expert who can watch someone for 15 minutes and know exactly what to tweak
That's the superpower of an expert coach
Maybe in a couple of days time have 150 really hot leads
I'm Happy Dave, let's get into it
I'm Appy Dave, see you in the next video
you've got all the information that you need to give a rich and engaging marketing campaign
we use context engineering and see if we can automate the marketing workflow
when you're doing something 150 times...we will get better over time
I love this iteration process where you do something with a good prompt, but then you use feedback from the system to improve the prompt
see you in the next video
in the next video, what we’ll do is, after we’ve done some human analysis on the data, we’ll start building some context reports
subscribe
like this video
I’m Appy Dave, see you in the next video
conversational and practical
Context engineering can automate repetitive expert outreach workflows, enabling one person to research and evaluate 150+ leads systematically
Structuring AI-assisted workflows around iterative prompt improvement creates a self-correcting system that gets better with each processed record
Separating raw source data from working files and maintaining a living CLAUDE.md system prompt keeps AI agents oriented as the project evolves
Combining automated web research with human expert scoring (scorecard) creates a hybrid workflow that preserves expert judgment while removing manual data gathering
Building test datasets from public records allows safe iteration of prompts before running them on real target prospects
Fact sheets and presence reports work best as a single combined output rather than separate files, minimizing context switching during human review
Allowing AI to identify and flag data gaps in its own outputs enables continuous prompt refinement without manual audit overhead
A hierarchical folder structure with indexed naming conventions makes large batches of AI-generated research files easy to navigate and reference
AI automated lead generation for coaches
context engineering Claude Code automation
public speaking coach outreach to plastic surgeons
AI prospect research workflow automation
ChatGPT prompt engineering for sales outreach
Are you an expert who can watch someone for 15 minutes and know exactly what to tweak or advice to give to take them to the next level?
How could you connect with 150 potentially target individuals and create an outreach report or connection that gets you a foot in the door?
Why don't we use context engineering and see if we can automate the marketing workflow?
Can you take the custom documents and just organize them?
Can it come up with a schema, can it extract the field names, plus can it come up with an output folder and the convention for any file names that we're about to write?
Can we get a different folder structure in that I would like each individual doctor to have their own folder?
Can you make sure that we just have one comprehensive prompt based on what you've been working on and put it into the prompts folder?
Do you think this is good?
Do we want a fat sheet and presence report?
Do we want to skip, do we want to request a consultation recording or mark as insufficient digital presence?
Could we have filled the gap ourselves by improving our prompts?
Should it just read from CSV, or from the online presence?
Should it update the workflow diagram?
What's the suggestion?
Is there, would you like help with TikTok or social media or online sort of presence?
Real-world client collaboration with a charisma coach (Guy Monroe) as the subject matter expert, grounding the workflow in an actual business use case rather than a hypothetical
Live demonstration of iterative prompt refinement — watching Claude Code improve its own prompts based on output gaps discovered during processing, not just using pre-written prompts
Context Engineering approach using Claude Code and CLAUDE.md as the system prompt anchor, showing how to maintain and evolve the AI context document as the project grows
Hybrid workflow design that combines human expert judgment (Guy manually scoring charisma/public speaking) with automated AI research and report generation, making the automation non-prescriptive
Anti-template philosophy — deliberately avoiding rigid output templates to allow the LLM to adapt its output format to each subject, while using formatting guidelines instead
End-to-end pipeline construction in a single session, from raw CSV to structured per-surgeon folders with research, scorecard, and presence report stages
Using test surgeons (publicly available, internationally diverse) as a safe iteration sandbox before applying the workflow to the actual 150-target list
Gap analysis as a first-class workflow step — the system documents what information is missing and feeds that back into prompt improvement rather than silently skipping it
Guy Monroe AI Marketing Plan

meta.note: 3-title array for thumbnail probe (supersedes prior string selectedTitle via last-write-wins; original preserved as audit)

value.title_ref: Can AI Research 150 Surgeons While You Sleep?
value.glyph_or_panel: Small gold crescent moon icon in upper-right corner as the single attention element
value.prompt: Create a 1280x720 YouTube thumbnail in the AppyDave brand system. Ground is a flat cream #faf5ec background occupying the entire frame. Behind everything sits a massive ghost watermark of the word 'AGENTS' in Oswald uppercase, brown #342d2d at 12% opacity, bleeding off the right edge so only the left two-thirds of the word is visible. In the foreground, the hook text reads exactly '150 WHILE YOU SLEEP' set in Bebas Neue uppercase, dark brown #342d2d, left-aligned, occupying about 55% of frame width across two lines ('150' large on top, 'WHILE YOU SLEEP' below). A small simple flat gold #ccba9d crescent moon icon sits in the upper-right corner as the single yellow-family accent. No humans, no photorealism, no halftone, no neon, no comic outlines. Palette strictly limited to brown #342d2d, gold #ccba9d, yellow #ffde59, cream #faf5ec. Typography-first composition, generous negative space.

value.title_ref: Can AI Research 150 Surgeons While You Sleep?
value.glyph_or_panel: Vertical 60/40 split: left dark-brown panel holds hook text, right cream panel holds a stylised stack of 150 thin horizontal lines representing a dossier list
value.prompt: Create a 1280x720 YouTube thumbnail in the AppyDave brand system. Vertical split-panel composition: the left 60% of the frame is dark brown #25201e, the right 40% is cream #faf5ec. Behind everything on the left panel, a ghost watermark of the word 'OVERNIGHT' in Bebas Neue uppercase, cream #faf5ec at 10% opacity, bleeds off the bottom edge. On the left panel, the hook text reads exactly 'AI DID THE RESEARCH' in Bebas Neue uppercase, bright yellow #ffde59, left-aligned, three lines stacked, occupying about 50% of frame width. On the right cream panel, render a stylised vertical stack of approximately 150 thin horizontal brown #342d2d lines suggesting a dense list of prospect dossiers, with a small gold #ccba9d header bar at the top. No humans, no photorealism, no halftone, no neon, no comic outlines. Palette strictly limited to brown #342d2d/#25201e, gold #ccba9d, yellow #ffde59, cream #faf5ec.

value.title_ref: Manual Outreach Is Costing Coaches More Than Time
value.glyph_or_panel: Ghost watermark dominates the composition; small yellow exclamation circle as the single attention element
value.prompt: Create a 1280x720 YouTube thumbnail in the AppyDave brand system. Ground is a flat cream #faf5ec background. The composition is Ghost-Forward: an enormous ghost watermark of the word 'MANUAL' in Bebas Neue uppercase, brown #342d2d at 14% opacity, spans nearly the full width of the frame and bleeds off the right edge — this watermark visually dominates the design. In front of the watermark, the hook text reads exactly 'COSTING MORE THAN TIME' in Bebas Neue uppercase, solid dark brown #342d2d, left-aligned across three lines, occupying about 50% of frame width in the lower-left. In the upper-right corner sits one small filled yellow #ffde59 circle containing a brown #342d2d exclamation mark as the single accent element. No humans, no photorealism, no halftone, no neon, no comic outlines. Palette strictly limited to brown #342d2d, gold #ccba9d, yellow #ffde59, cream #faf5ec.
